tagline: Enhancing Your Natural Beauty — Mind, Body & Wellness in Midtown Manhattan

hero.headline: Your Midtown Oasis for Timeless Beauty
hero.subheadline: For over 25 years, Elite Day Spa has been Manhattan's trusted destination for European-style beauty and wellness. Our globally trained experts deliver personalized treatments that leave you feeling renewed — just relax and let us take care of the rest.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: European Beauty Traditions,<br class="hidden md:block"> New York Style
services.subtitle: From expert waxing and rejuvenating facials to therapeutic massage and medical aesthetics, our globally trained team delivers the full spectrum of beauty and wellness under one roof.

cards.title: European Waxing
cards.description: Expert European-style hair removal including Brazilian bikini wax, full body, and facial waxing. Our estheticians bring 30+ years of waxing mastery since 1984.

cards.title: Massage Therapy
cards.description: Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone, Thai, prenatal, and couples massage. Our skilled therapists tailor every session to relieve stress and rejuvenate your body.

cards.title: Facials & Skin Care
cards.description: Advanced European facials, microdermabrasion, chemical peels, LED therapy, and anti-aging treatments using premium SOTHYS products for radiant, healthy skin.

cards.title: Manicures & Pedicures
cards.description: Classic and gel manicures, luxurious pedicures, dip powder, nail extensions, and French options. Enjoy our Monday and Tuesday gel mani-pedi specials.

cards.title: Hair Services
cards.description: Professional blow drys, precision cuts, stunning color, highlights, balayage, and updos by celebrity-level stylists who bring out your best look.

cards.title: Medical Aesthetics
cards.description: Botox, Juvederm, and Restylane injectables administered by certified professionals. Turn back the clock with safe, effective anti-aging treatments.

steps.title: Book Your Appointment
steps.description: Call us or book online. Tell us what you need and we will match you with the perfect treatment and specialist. Walk-ins are welcome too.

steps.title: Enjoy Expert Care
steps.description: Arrive at our intimate 6th-floor oasis on West 46th Street and let our globally trained beauty experts work their magic with personalized, attentive service.

steps.title: Leave Feeling Renewed
steps.description: Walk out looking and feeling your absolute best. Our treatments are designed to deliver lasting results that enhance your natural beauty and well-being.

about.label: Why New Yorkers Trust Us
about.headline: A European Spa Tradition in the Heart of Manhattan
about.description: Women-owned and serving Midtown Manhattan since 2000, Elite Day Spa brings authentic European beauty traditions to New York City. Our team of globally trained experts carries over 200 years of combined experience, treating every guest with the personalized attention you deserve. Step into our intimate oasis on the 6th floor of 33 West 46th Street and leave the city behind.

features.title: Globally Trained Beauty Experts
features.description: Our estheticians and therapists have traveled the world to master their craft, each bringing 30+ years of hands-on experience.

features.title: Women-Owned Since 2000
features.description: A women-owned business committed to creating a welcoming, nurturing environment where every guest feels valued and cared for.

features.title: Your Satisfaction, Guaranteed
features.description: Not thrilled with your experience? We will make it right. Your happiness and confidence are what drive us every single day.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose from individual treatments, spa packages, or membership plans. We offer options for every budget and every beauty goal.

guarantee.headline: Our "Total Satisfaction" Promise
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any treatment, we will redo it at no charge or credit your account. With 26 years of serving Manhattan, our reputation is everything — and we stand behind every single service we provide.

faqs.question: What should I expect during my first visit?
faqs.answer: We will welcome you into our calming 6th-floor sanctuary, discuss your goals with a complimentary consultation, and recommend the perfect treatments for your needs. Our team ensures you feel comfortable and informed every step of the way.

faqs.question: Do I need to book an appointment?
faqs.answer: Appointments are recommended to guarantee your preferred time and specialist, but we do accept walk-ins when availability allows. You can book online, by phone, or simply stop by our Midtown location.

faqs.question: What makes your waxing services different?
faqs.answer: Our European waxing heritage dates back to 1984. Our estheticians have 30+ years of individual experience using refined European techniques that minimize discomfort and deliver smoother, longer-lasting results.

faqs.question: Do you offer couples treatments?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer couples massage and spa packages designed for shared relaxation. It is the perfect way to celebrate an anniversary, birthday, or simply enjoy quality time together in our peaceful setting.

faqs.question: What skincare products do you use?
faqs.answer: We are proud partners with SOTHYS, a premium French skincare line trusted by top spas worldwide. All our facial and body treatments feature these high-performance products for exceptional, lasting results.

testimonials.name: Nancy's Client
testimonials.text: I had a wonderful, last-minute pedicure with Nancy. She was kind and gave me a perfect pedicure. The atmosphere was welcoming and relaxing from the moment I walked in.

testimonials.name: Athletic Client
testimonials.text: The massage from therapist Mira was the best I have ever had. As an athlete needing strong deep tissue work, she knew exactly how to address my needs and delivered an incredible session.

testimonials.name: Regular Client
testimonials.text: If you are looking for a place to unwind and truly relax, this is it. The service is exceptional and the staff goes above and beyond to make sure you feel pampered and cared for.

contact.headline:
Ready to Look and Feel
Your Absolute Best?
contact.subtitle: Book your appointment today and discover why New Yorkers have trusted Elite Day Spa for over 25 years. Walk-ins welcome, consultations always complimentary.
